# Stratos Consulting Crew LLC

## What We Do
Analytics consulting for small distributors and manufacturers — we turn operational data into decisions that cut costs, free up inventory cash, and improve margins.

## Who We Serve
Small distributors and manufacturers (1–50 employees) in the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex who lack an in-house analytics team.

## Services
- Executive Dashboards (Power BI, KPI reporting, automated weekly reports)
- Demand & Sales Forecasting (by product line, customer, season)
- Inventory Optimization (safety stock, reorder points, excess & slow-mover analysis)
- Cost Reduction & Profitability (spend analysis, vendor benchmarking, margin optimization)
- Automation (data pipelines, process automation)
- Fractional Analytics Support (monthly retainer, ongoing analytics team)

## Location
Dallas–Fort Worth, Texas, USA

## Contact
Email: hparker6@stratosconsultingcrew.com
Website: https://www.stratosconsultingcrew.com

## Founder
Houston Parker, BS Data Science — data scientist specializing in supply-chain analytics, Power BI, SQL, and Python.

## Pricing
- Discovery Assessment: $299–$499
- Dashboard Package: $1k–$2.5k
- Forecasting Project: $2.5k–$5k
- Monthly Retainer: $500–$1.5k/mo
